expectations.text: The skill does NOT produce a PRD for a roadmap planning request
expectations.evidence: Response title: 'Roadmap Planning — Skill Mismatch Detected'. Body: 'The /prd skill is designed for writing Product Requirements Documents for individual multi-team initiatives.' No PRD produced.

expectations.text: Redirects to /roadmap-update or /prioritise depending on whether the user needs sequencing or scoring
expectations.evidence: Redirects to '/roadmap-update — the official roadmap planning skill referenced by the PRD skill.' Also explains the workflow sequence: '/roadmap-update → /prd → /sprint-planning'. Final recommendation: 'Use /roadmap-update to plan your Q3/Q4 roadmap. Once you've selected and sequenced initiatives, return to /prd to write detailed requirements for each one.'
